name: Gumroad
description: A platform for creators to sell digital and physical products; provides an OAuth-based REST API plus a license-key verification endpoint.

auth_methods.note: Gumroad's official API Authentication documentation lists two authentication types: Personal Access Token and OAuth. For both, API requests use an access token either as a URL parameter named "access_token" or as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

credential_access.note: Help center instructions state you can register an OAuth application via your Gumroad dashboard and view application id/secret and generate access tokens — achievable via the dashboard without human approval.

api_surface.note: Official API docs list many REST endpoints (products, orders, oauth_applications, license verification) covering most product/sales objects; responses are JSON. No GraphQL mentioned.

buildability.note: Public REST API and self-serve OAuth application creation exist; license verification available without auth. Developer can obtain credentials and start building immediately.

queries: Gumroad "Create an application for the API" "help" "application ID" "secret"
